name: logistics managers at freight brokers processing 10–20 shipments/month tool
description: For logistics managers at freight brokers processing 10–20 shipments/month, exceeding budget thresholds causes cash flow gaps. We automate cost monitoring instead of manual tracking of freight expenses.
target_audience: logistics managers at freight brokers processing 10–20 shipments/month
problem_solved: exceeding budget thresholds on freight costs
